actions.text: The new EU framework on AI regulation is a crucial step towards ensuring that technology companies prioritize ethical considerations in their pursuit of innovation. As someone with a background in machine learning engineering, I believe that such regulations will encourage responsible AI development and deployment, ultimately benefiting both the tech industry and society as a whole.
